headline: One of These Oil Services Stocks Is Pulling Away From the Pack: Baker Hughes, Haliburton, SLB
summary: Benchmark West Texas Intermediate crude oil surged from $55.44 a barrel in mid-December 2025 to $94.65 as of March 9, and the oil services sector is moving with it. On Tuesday, Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR), Halliburton (NYSE: HAL), and SLB (NYSE: SLB) (formerly Schlumberger) all traded sharply higher, with the VanEck Oil Services ETF (NYSEARCA: ... One of These Oil Services Stocks Is Pulling Away From the Pack: Baker Hughes, Haliburton, SLB

headline: Baker Hughes, Petrobras Sign Strategic Service Agreement for Critical Turbomachinery Equipment

headline: Baker Hughes Lands Mega Petrobras Deal To Power Brazil's Energy Backbone
summary: Baker Hughes and Petrobras sign a 5-year deal to service 64 gas turbines, boosting reliability for Brazil's offshore and refinery sites.
